forgotPasswordModal.title: Password Recovery
forgotPasswordModal.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive instructions

forgotPasswordModal.success_tip: The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgotPasswordModal.error_sending: An error occurred while sending the request. Please try again later.
forgotPasswordModal.error_too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

maintenancePage.title: Maintenance
maintenancePage.subtitle: The site is temporarily unavailable.
maintenancePage.default_message: We are working to improve the service. Please try again later.

protectedRoute.auth_required_subtitle: You must be logged in to access this page.
protectedRoute.auth_required_tip: After logging in, you will be able to create presets, manage materials, and use all the features of the platform.
protectedRoute.access_denied_admin: This page is only available to administrators.
protectedRoute.access_denied_brand: This page is only available to brand representatives.

resetPasswordModal.title: Set a new password
resetPasswordModal.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
resetPasswordModal.success_message: You can now log in with your new password.
resetPasswordModal.error_reset_failed: An error occurred while resetting the password. Please try again later.
resetPasswordModal.error_invalid_token: Invalid or expired password reset token.

deletedPresetsModal.title: Presets deleted in OrcaSlicer
deletedPresetsModal.subtitle: You deleted {{count}} preset{{count, plural, one {} other {s}}} in OrcaSlicer. Choose what to do with them in FilamentHub.
deletedPresetsModal.action_selection_title: What to do with selected presets?
deletedPresetsModal.action_restore_short: The preset will reappear in OrcaSlicer
deletedPresetsModal.action_restore_full: The preset will return to OrcaSlicer on next sync. It will remain available in FilamentHub.
deletedPresetsModal.action_delete_short: The preset will disappear from your profile
deletedPresetsModal.action_delete_full: The preset will be removed from the "Filament Profiles" section on the website. It will remain available in the FilamentHub catalog. ⚠️ Presets created by you are not deleted.
deletedPresetsModal.action_skip_full: The preset will remain in FilamentHub but will no longer automatically sync with OrcaSlicer.
deletedPresetsModal.save_rule_checkbox: Save this action as a rule for future deletions
deletedPresetsModal.warning_no_presets_selected: Please select at least one preset
deletedPresetsModal.extra_data_not_found: Could not load deleted presets data.

adminBrandRequests.title: Brand Verification Requests
adminBrandRequests.confirm_delete_message: All associated files will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

adminDatabase.title: Database Management
adminDatabase.description: Migrations, export and import of the database

integrityCheck.title: Database Integrity Check
integrityCheck.restoreButtonTitle: Will first try to apply migrations, then a fallback method

restoreSteps.step1: Tries to apply all migrations to head (the correct way)
restoreSteps.step2: If that fails, uses a fallback method via SQLAlchemy metadata
restoreSteps.manualAlternative: Alternatively, you can manually apply migrations using the "To head" button in the migrations section above.

migrations.title: Alembic Migrations
migrations.notInitialized: Database not initialized. Click "To head" to apply all migrations.
migrations.latestDescription: The newest migration in the code
migrations.applyXNewMigrations: {{count}} migrations need to be applied. Click "To head" to update the database.
migrations.allApplied: All migrations applied. Database is up to date.
migrations.howToUseHead: "To head" — apply all unapplied migrations to the latest (recommended)
migrations.howToUseApply: "Apply" — apply a migration from the input field:
migrations.howToUseApplyHead: head — apply all to the latest
migrations.howToUseApplyPlusOne: +1 — apply the next single migration (if current is 1a99f4734fc4, the next one will be applied)
migrations.howToUseDowngradeBase: base — downgrade all migrations to the beginning
migrations.howToUseClickHint: Or click the up arrow next to a specific migration in the table
migrations.statusExplanationTitle: What do the migration statuses mean:
migrations.statusAppliedDesc: The migration is already applied to the database. Tables/columns have been created.
migrations.statusPendingDesc: The migration has not yet been applied. It needs to be applied to update the DB.
migrations.statusHeadDesc: The latest migration in the code. There are no other migrations after it.
migrations.currentLabelHint: Current — label indicates the current database revision (the last applied migration).

import.title: Import Database
import.importingDescription: Importing the database can take several minutes. Please wait...
import.errorTimeout: ⚠️ Request timeout exceeded. Importing large files can take a long time.

adminFeedback.modal_response_placeholder: Enter your response to the user...
adminFeedback.alert_enter_response: Please enter a response to the user

catalogPage.heroTitle: Find perfect settings for your filament
catalogPage.heroSubtitle: Materials database with official manufacturer presets and community-verified settings
